disambiguation_rules.director of cisa: Resolved as Director of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency, a specific officer role within CISA
disambiguation_rules.secretary: Resolved as Secretary of Homeland Security, acting through the Director of CISA in program administration
disambiguation_rules.the department: Resolved as Department of Homeland Security based on context of Homeland Security Act amendments

parsing_rules: Programs and initiatives with acronyms should be extracted as separate named_docs entries when the acronym is parenthetically defined (e.g., 'PIVOTT Program' requires extraction alongside full program name).

oddities.note: Section 2 heading references 'CISA EDUCATION AND TRAINING PROGRAMS AND RESOURCES' as a structural section title rather than introducing new named entities; this appears to be a section header establishing the programmatic scope rather than a distinct initiative with its own identity.

llm_disambiguation_log.resolved: Resolved as Director of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency, a specific officer role within CISA
Resolved as Secretary of Homeland Security, acting through the Director of CISA in program administration
Resolved as Department of Homeland Security based on context of Homeland Security Act amendments
